en: Biff.
Hey, I'm talking to you, McFly, you Irish bunk. Oh, hey, Biff. Hey, guys. How are you doing?
ko: 이봐, 맥플라이, 너랑 얘기하고 있어, 아일랜드 바보. 아, 안녕, 비프. 얘들아, 잘 지내?

en: You got my homework finished, McFly?
Uh, well, actually, I figured since it wasn't due till Monday. Hello?
Hello? Anybody home?
Hey, think, McFly. Think?
I got to have time to recall for you.
ko: 너를 위해 다시 생각할 시간이 필요해.

en: Do you realize what would happen if I hand in my homework and your handwriting?
ko: 내 숙제를 네 글씨로 제출하면 무슨 일이 일어날지 알아?

en: I'd get kicked out of school.
You wouldn't want that to happen, would you? Would you? Well, now, of course not, Biff.
ko: 그런 일이 생기길 원하지 않겠지? 그렇지? 물론이지, 비프.

en: I wouldn't want that to happen.
What are you looking at, butthead?
Hey, Biff, get a load of this guy's life preserver. Dort thinks he's gonna drown.
ko: 이봐, 비프, 이 친구의 구명조끼 좀 봐. 그는 익을 거라고 생각해.

en: Yeah, so, uh, how about my homework, McFly?
ko: 그래, 그럼 내 숙제는 어때, 맥플라이?

en: Uh, okay, Biff.
Well, I'll, uh, I'll finish that on up tonight,
and then I'll, uh, bring it over first thing tomorrow morning.
ko: 그리고 내일 아침 제일 먼저 가져올게.

en: Hey, not too early. I sleep in Sundays.
ko: 너무 이른 건 안 돼. 나는 일요일에 늦잠 자.

en: Oh, McFly, your shoes aren't tied. Ah!
ko: 오, 맥플라이, 네 신발 끈이 안 묶였어. 아!

en: Don't be so gullible, McFly.
I don't want to see you in here again.
Okay, all right, bye-bye.
